tax: Placed at class rank, Fire Elementals is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a pure fire-element body of combustion or heated rock, animated by fire-pressure, fuel, or vent heat. A new order belongs here only if it shows a distinct fire-state body-plan with its own fuel or heat source and field signs.
ap: The grouping is recognised by a flame, a creeping glow, a lava lobe, or a glass figure giving off heat. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — scorch and soot, an ash-creep, a cooled basalt lobe, or a glass-flake litter — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Fire Elementals occupies gas-seeps, oil stores, fungal mat, lava benches, thermal vents, and obsidian margins. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where a fire-pressure spark ignites fuel, or vent heat melts or quenches rock and recur with the vent refills, the mat regrows, or the rock reheats and re-forms, sustaining themselves on combustion of fuel or thermal-vent heat.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: members chase fuel and heat, spreading or flowing, and either die without fuel or fall dormant as cooled rock. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: a heat body, immunity to fire, and a smothering, flooding, or cooling failure. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each order and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: ignition and spread, or engulfing heat and cutting glass. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Fire Elementals matters because they turn fuel pockets and warm benches into spreading-fire, radiant-heat, and shrapnel hazards. It lets survey reports sort fire hazards by state, so a crew knows whether to shutter lamps, rod-test mat, read glowing cracks, or avoid striking glass without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Fire Elementals is the class-rank grouping of true elementals composed of the fire element, from open flame to molten and cooled rock within the True Elementals. Its members share a body of heat — combustion or fire-heated rock — that consumes fuel or holds vent-heat rather than breeding, and divide below into order groups by whether the heat is open combustion (Pyric) or heated rock (Magmatic). Fire is the most actively spreading elemental class, and the one the Lanternkin and Forgemasters fear at lamp and forge.
